title: Operation Secret Recipe
author: Elisabetta Dami
desc: Geronimo races around Milan to catch a look-alike thief and recover the stolen secret panettone recipe! 🎂

q.en: What time was it when someone woke Geronimo by throwing rocks at his window?
q.zh: 有人往窗外扔石头把杰罗尼摩吵醒时，是几点钟？

options.en: Noon
Eight in the evening according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 晚上八点（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Midnight
Five o'clock in the morning

explain.en: Geronimo checked the time and saw it was five o'clock in the morning when the rocks started hitting his window.
explain.zh: 杰罗尼摩看了看时间，发现石头砸到他窗户时正是清晨五点。

q.en: What city in Italy did the Stilton family take Geronimo to?
q.zh: 斯蒂顿一家把杰罗尼摩带到了意大利的哪座城市？

options.en: Milan
Naples
Venice
Rome

explain.en: Thea told Geronimo to bring clothes because they were going to Milan, Italy.
explain.zh: 蒂娅让杰罗尼摩带上衣服，因为他们要去意大利的米兰。

q.en: Who is Scooter Bookworm, the mouse who explains why they came to Milan?
q.zh: 向他们解释此行原因的斯库特·书虫是谁？

options.en: The chef who invented panettone according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 发明潘妮朵尼的厨师（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A young history professor and friend of Thea
options.zh: 一位年轻的历史教授，也是蒂娅的朋友

options.en: Geronimo's grandfather
A pirate cat in disguise

explain.en: Scooter Bookworm is a young history professor who specializes in the history of Milan and is a friend of Thea's.
explain.zh: 斯库特·书虫是一位年轻的历史教授，专攻米兰历史，也是蒂娅的朋友。

q.en: What precious treasure was stolen from the Royal Palace?
q.zh: 从王宫里被偷走的珍贵宝物是什么？

options.en: The ancient scroll with the secret panettone recipe
options.zh: 写着潘妮朵尼秘方的古老卷轴

options.en: Geronimo's newspaper
A golden statue of a cat according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一座金色猫雕像（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A ruby ring

explain.en: Scooter cried that someone stole the scroll showing the original secret recipe for panettone.
explain.zh: 斯库特惊呼有人偷走了记载潘妮朵尼原始秘方的卷轴。

q.en: How did the thief disguise himself to look exactly like Geronimo?
q.zh: 小偷如何伪装得和杰罗尼摩一模一样？

options.en: A pirate hat and wooden leg
A purple shawl and sailor's cap according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 紫色披肩和水手帽（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A green suit, red tie, and round glasses
options.zh: 绿色西装、红领带和圆框眼镜

options.en: A panettone costume

explain.en: Under his janitor disguise the thief wore a green suit, the same red tie, and round glasses just like Geronimo.
explain.zh: 小偷在清洁工伪装下面穿着绿色西装、同样的红领带，还戴着和杰罗尼摩一样的圆框眼镜。

q.en: What clue did the thief throw in the garbage after the heist?
q.zh: 偷走卷轴后，小偷把什么线索扔进了垃圾桶？

options.en: The stolen ruby ring
A dented can of tuna according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一个凹掉的金枪鱼罐头（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A fish bone
His blue janitor uniform, which held a map
options.zh: 他的蓝色清洁工制服，里面藏着一张地图

explain.en: Benjamin and Bugsy noticed the thief threw his blue uniform in the garbage, and a folded map was in its pocket.
explain.zh: 本杰明和巴格西注意到小偷把蓝色制服扔进垃圾桶，而折叠起来的地图就藏在口袋里。

q.en: At the La Scala Theater, what did the thief steal while pretending to be Geronimo?
q.zh: 在斯卡拉剧院，假扮杰罗尼摩的小偷偷走了什么？

options.en: The panettone scroll according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 潘妮朵尼卷轴（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A precious crystal flute
An ice cream cone
A statue of Bastet

explain.en: From an upper window the thief shouted that he, Geronimo, was stealing a precious crystal flute.
explain.zh: 小偷从剧院楼上的窗户大喊，他杰罗尼摩正在偷走一支珍贵的 Crystal 长笛。

q.en: At Sforza Castle, what statue did the thief steal from the Egyptian Museum?
q.zh: 在斯福尔扎城堡，小偷从埃及博物馆偷走了哪座雕像？

options.en: A golden mouse
The Rodent's Gazette sign
The goddess Bastet, a cat goddess
options.zh: 巴斯特女神，也就是猫女神

options.en: Leonardo's helicopter model according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 达·芬奇的直升机模型（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Guards said the thief stole the statue of Bastet, the ancient Egyptian cat goddess.
explain.zh: 守卫说小偷偷走了古埃及猫女神巴斯特的雕像。

q.en: How did Benjamin prove which Geronimo was the real one?
q.zh: 本杰明是怎么证明哪个才是真正的杰罗尼摩的？

options.en: The real Geronimo ripped three buttons off his pajamas
options.zh: 真正的杰罗尼摩是睡衣上被扯掉三颗扣子的那个

options.en: The real one was wearing a panettone costume according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 穿着潘妮朵尼造型服的是真的（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: The real one knew how to fly the Super RV
options.zh: 真正会开超级房车的是真的

options.en: The real one had a fishy smell
options.zh: 身上有鱼腥味的是真的

explain.en: Benjamin asked how many buttons were ripped off that morning; the fake said two from a jacket, but the real Geronimo ripped three off his pajamas.
explain.zh: 本杰明问当天早上扯掉了几颗扣子，假的小偷说是外套上两颗，但真正的杰罗尼摩是睡衣上被扯掉三颗。

q.en: What was the thief really, and why did he frame Geronimo?
q.zh: 小偷到底是什么，他又为何要陷害杰罗尼摩？

options.en: A robot built by Professor Cheesepuff according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 奶酪泡芙教授制造的机器人（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: A pirate cat trying to sink The Rodent's Gazette and invade Mouse Island
options.zh: 一只想搞垮《鼠民公报》并入侵老鼠岛的海盗猫

options.en: A chef who wanted the recipe
Geronimo's lost twin brother
options.zh: 杰罗尼摩失散的双胞胎兄弟

explain.en: The thief confessed he was a pirate cat; the cats wanted to jail Geronimo, sink his newspaper, and invade Mouse Island undetected.
explain.zh: 小偷承认自己是一只海盗猫，猫群想让杰罗尼摩坐牢、搞垮他的报纸，从而神不知鬼不觉地入侵老鼠岛。
